junior week apr. 16, 2026

website updates

mold

needed to print out 6 parts for the silicone mold, so i spent most of my time updating my website. probably could've finished if not for one of the prints lifting and breaking

lifted and then i broke it off to make it work. it didn't work
bottom left and right pieces. they snap together omg (kinda iffy, but should work)

middle layer also came out fine

middle left and right pieces. they work slightly better than the left pieces

final two pieces should be able to be printed next week and i can start making the mold hopefully

website

didn't like my home page + didn't like the way i sorted the folders and everything, causing my img links to look like this: "/static/img/junior/27+28/keyb.webp"

remade the homepage to be more compact, adding a night/light toggle switch as well

also started to use 11ty to simplify the folder directives and makes it possible to create blog posts with markdown rather than html. makes it easier when writing

also redid the blog section because i wasn't the biggest fan of the poorly made preview images

new website isn't live because i did all this in a new folder, copy pasting whatever i could from this html / css.

still need to make the projets section and contact section. i also wanna change the emoji's on the home page to use svgs instead.

new website next week? and hopefully silicone mold works
